title: abc9: add support for required times
body:
With arrival times (clock-to-q time) added in #1312, this adds support for required (setup) times using a similar interface (an `(* abc9_required=<positive-int> *)` attribute). Since `abc9` does not fully support this, emulate it using dynamically generated 1-input 1-output blackboxes.

With this, the box entries for `abc9_flop`-s are also dynamically generated too from arrival/required specifications.
